topic.title: TA Office Hours Schedule
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Since TA office hours have had strong attendance this week, I’ll continue the same schedule for the upcoming weeks as well:

Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday: 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM EST

 

Feel free to join if you have questions about assignments, lectures, or anything related to the course. If you're unavailable during these hours, reach out on teams and I'll be happy to help you one-on-one.

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
